name: AI Metering
description: Tracks token usage and cost for every AI operation dispatched through the ai module — any provider, any operation. Adds per-user quotas, multi-currency display with live exchange rates, and a usage dashboard.

suggests.drupal/ai_usage_limits: Shows a provider-level system ceiling as a read-only banner on the dashboard.
suggests.drupal/ai_translate: Primary use case for the HTMX pre-call cost estimation badge.

storage: Custom DB tables ai_metering_usage (per-call log) and ai_metering_quota (per-user monthly budget); no content/config entities.
